name: GH_ClipboardType
summary: Enumerates all possible clipboards for GH_DocumentIO operations.

enum_values.name: System
enum_values.summary: Identifies the Operating System clipboard shared amongst all applications.

enum_values.name: Local
enum_values.summary: Identifies the DocumentIO clipboard which is only accessible from within a single instance of GH_DocumentIO.

enum_values.name: Global
enum_values.summary: Identifies the DocumentIO clipboard which is accessible from all instances of GH_DocumentIO in this AppDomain.
